title: Hyperliquid payments with Cypher
summary_title: Cypher Card: Spend your Hyperliquid perps directly on Visa worldwide
summary_description: On-chain banking platform launches prepaid Visa cards for HyperLiquid traders—turn perps into coffee in one click, no withdrawal delays.

key_moments.label: RecGang becomes first NFT community on Hyperliquid
Cypher introduces on-chain bank account vision and card product
Live demo: collapsing six-step off-ramp into single-click card load
Confirms integration with HyperCore only, not HyperEVM
PBR requests HLP vault auto-load feature for cards
Cypher token and merchant incentive protocol launching this year
Identifies predatory 5-8% forex fees at point-of-sale, educates users
Currently 25-50 signups; prioritizes product-market fit over launch hype

pull_quote: Collapse all these steps into a single step and make it instant. Click of a button, you can load it to Cypher in a minute max, then go buy coffee with it.
